ul.li: T_LOCKED: Transaction is closed to new handles but not yet persistent.
JBD2_COMMIT_BLOCK: The 512B/4KB block that makes the txn valid.
FUA (Force Unit Access): Bypasses volatile drive cache; writes directly to platter/NAND.
Atomic Commit Point: If the system crashes before the Commit Record ACK, the entire txn is discarded during recovery.
Checksum: crc32c used to verify log integrity during the journal_recover phase.

g.text: Step 3: Atomic Commit Record (Point of No Return)
Exception: I/O Device Failure during Commit
